label: Transparent oyster bed motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an oyster bed motif: a compact cluster of overlapping oyster shells from a tidal estuary, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: Irregular oyster shells with slate grey outer ridges, pearl cream interiors, chalky white shell lips, subtle mudflat taupe edges, small algae green traces in creases, and briny mineral texture. The cluster should feel practical and supply-system oriented: layered, sortable, durable, tidal, not decorative.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any shell edges. Slight three-quarter top view so the shell ridges, pearly interiors, hinge layers, and algae seams are visible.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves shell texture, nacre highlights, slate-grey ridges, and muted algae detail without dramatic shadows.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no ocean background, no water, no sand field, no tray, no utensils, no food styling, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Oyster Bed" derived from the visible transparent oyster-shell cluster cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible motif: slate grey shell ridges, pearl cream interiors, chalk-white shell lips, mudflat taupe mineral edges, algae green traces, layered hinge lines, and practical tidal-estuary supply structure. The board is the reference for coding a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme, so token roles and component examples must be clear and readable.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design-system board, exact target 3840 x 2160, high-resolution 4K-class source board.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous spacing, clean grid, and avoid dense tiny token tables. Every section label must remain legible in a gallery preview.
Required visible sections: Morphous Oyster Bed, Oyster Bed, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 見出し, 本文. Show multilingual product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture swatches, small supply/logistics icons.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, utilitarian operational interface, 8px card radius, practical supply-system mood, shell-ridge dividers, pearly mineral surfaces, tidal ledger cards, sortable inventory panels, calm high-contrast product UI.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: slate grey, pearl cream, chalk white, algae green, mudflat taupe, brine mist grey-green, nacre highlight, estuary ink. Keep the system practical, coastal, quiet, and work-focused.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no marketing hero layout, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Oyster Bed", no tiny illegible text.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Oyster Bed design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent oyster-bed motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Oyster Bed board as references. Preserve the slate grey, pearl cream, chalk white, algae green, mudflat taupe, brine mist grey-green, nacre highlight, and estuary ink palette roles. Preserve the practical supply-system component language, shell-ridge dividers, pearly mineral texture, ledger/inventory workflow, Japanese typography, and full shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. The dark design-system board is the reference for coding future dark-mode tokens, so state roles and component states must be clear.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design-system board, exact target 3840 x 2160, high-resolution 4K-class source board.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous spacing, clean grid, and avoid dense tiny token tables. Every section label must remain legible in a gallery preview.
Required visible sections: Morphous Oyster Bed, Oyster Bed, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Visual details: dark background derived from estuary ink and wet slate grey, card surfaces from deep tidal slate, primary accents from pearl cream and nacre highlight, secondary accents from algae green, text from chalk white and pearl cream, restrained coastal contrast, subtle shell-ridge and mudflat mineral overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 見出し, 本文.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture swatches, small supply/logistics icons.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no unrelated saturated colors, no marketing hero layout, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Oyster Bed", no tiny illegible text.
